name: new-production-blueprint
prompt: Create a production-ready Next.js App Router security blueprint for a dashboard app with auth, Server Actions, DAL, validation, CSP, rate limits, and CI.

name: server-action-review
prompt: Review this Server Action: it deletes a project by id from FormData but only hides the delete button from non-admin users in the client UI. Explain the production issue and fix it.

name: route-handler-hardening
prompt: Make a Next.js Route Handler POST endpoint production-ready for creating private user data with cookie auth.

name: description-triggering
prompt: My Next.js app uses use client everywhere, passes raw Prisma user objects to client components, and has secrets in NEXT_PUBLIC variables. Audit it.
